ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "inchikey" TEXT /* InChIKey representation of the compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the compound */,
  "log_s" REAL /* LogS value of the compound */,
  "log_p" REAL /* LogP value of the compound */,
  "mw" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "compound_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "compound_type" TEXT /* Type of the compound (e.g., small molecule, peptide, nucleotide) */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the compound */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the compound */,
  "charge" INTEGER /* Charge of the compound */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the compound is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_smiles FOREIGN KEY ("smiles") REFERENCES smiles ("smiles"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_inchikey FOREIGN KEY ("inchikey") REFERENCES inchikeys ("inchikey")
)

CREATE TABLE "inchikeys" (
  "inchikey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each InChIKey */,
  "inchikey" TEXT /* InChIKey representation of the compound */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the InChIKey */,
  "standard_inchi" TEXT /* Standard InChI representation of the compound */,
  "standard_inchi_key" TEXT /* Standard InChIKey representation of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inchikey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smiles" (
  "smiles_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SMILES */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the compound */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SMILES */,
  "canonical_smiles" TEXT /* Canonical SMILES representation of the compound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smiles_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., LogS, LogP, MW) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Value of the property */,
  "property_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the property (e.g., g/mol, kcal/mol) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., physical, chemical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the compound */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the compound was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_project_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "compound_id" TEXT /* ID of the compound */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "map_date" TEXT /* Date the compound was mapped to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_project_map_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_project_map_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
